title: polystichopsis cavaleriei
intro: Polystichopsis cavaleriei is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to China, and it is commonly referred to as the Cavalerie's shield fern. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichopsis cavaleriei include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this fern can be made into teas or infusions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a dried powder or capsule.
